title: CVE-2026-34910: Ubiquiti UniFi OS RCE
summary: [P1] Ubiquiti UniFi OS contains an improper input validation vulnerability that could allow a malicious actor to execute arbitrary code, and it is being actively exploited in the wild. No patch is currently available. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild (confidence: 0.90)

primary.title: CISA Adds Four Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog

enrichment.lede: CISA Adds Four Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog.

title: CVE-2026-34909: Ubiquiti UniFi OS Path Traversal
summary: [P1] Ubiquiti UniFi OS contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow a malicious actor to access sensitive files, and it is being actively exploited in the wild. No patch is currently available. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: Vulnerability allows access to sensitive files
